title: ADVANCED MAZE GENERATOR PRO - Professional Maze Creation for Blender
description:
Advanced Maze Generator Pro

Professional Maze Creation for Blender

Transform your creative projects with the most comprehensive maze generation add-on for Blender!
Advanced Maze Generator Pro delivers professional-grade maze creation tools with unparalleled flexibility and control.





🔥 Key Features

🎯 20+ Generation Algorithms

  • Recursive Backtracking – Classic depth-first exploration

  • Kruskal's Algorithm – Minimum spanning tree approach

  • Prim's Algorithm – Weighted random selection

  • Wilson's Algorithm – Loop-erased random walks

  • Eller's Algorithm – Row-by-row generation

  • Binary Tree – Simple directional bias

  • Sidewinder – Horizontal corridor creation

  • Growing Tree – Flexible priority-based generation

  • …and many more advanced algorithms!

🎨 Diverse Maze Shapes

  • Rectangle, Circle, Ellipse, Triangle

  • Diamond, Pentagon, Hexagon, Octagon

  • Five-pointed Star, Heart, Cross

  • Ring, L-shape, T-shape, Spiral

  • Fractal patterns, Noise-based shapes

  • Custom shape support

⚙️ Professional Controls

  • Advanced complexity settings with fine-tuning

  • Symmetry generation for balanced designs

  • Room generation with multiple connection types

  • Central path creation with customizable styles

  • Edge circuit paths for perimeter navigation

  • Loop control for non-traditional mazes

  • Weighted generation with heat maps

  • Traffic flow analysis and optimization

🎭 Visual Customization

  • Multiple wall and floor styles

  • Adjustable wall angles and thickness

  • Material assignment and color control

  • Solution path visualization

  • Start/end point markers

  • Merged object optimization for performance

🚀 Advanced Features

  • Batch generation for multiple mazes

  • Export/Import maze data (JSON format)

  • Performance monitoring and optimization

  • Quality assessment and scoring

  • Path analysis and difficulty scaling

  • Professional documentation included

💼 Perfect For:

  • Game Development – Level design and navigation puzzles

  • Architecture – Complex layouts and floor plans

  • Education – Algorithm visualization and learning

  • Art Projects – Procedural art and installations

  • VR/AR – Immersive maze experiences

  • 3D Printing – Physical maze models

  • Animation – Dynamic maze sequences

🛠️ Technical Specifications

  • Compatible with Blender 3.0+

  • Optimized mesh generation

  • Memory-efficient algorithms

  • Customizable performance limits

  • Cross-platform compatibility

  • Professional-grade code quality

📊 Performance Optimized


  • Merged geometry for large mazes

  • Configurable quality levels

  • Memory usage controls

  • Timeout protection

  • Iteration limits for stability

🎯 Easy to Use

  • Intuitive N-Panel interface

  • Real-time preview updates

  • Comprehensive tooltips

  • Professional documentation

  • Example files included

✨ Whether you're creating game levels, architectural visualizations, educational content, or art installations, Advanced Maze Generator Pro provides the tools and flexibility you need to bring your maze visions to life.

👉 Get started today and unlock the endless possibilities of procedural maze generation in Blender!
documentation:
ADVANCED MAZE GENERATOR PRO – USER DOCUMENTATION

📑 Table of Contents

  1. Installation

  2. Getting Started

  3. Basic Controls

  4. Advanced Features

  5. Algorithm Reference

  6. Shape Options

  7. Performance Settings

  8. Troubleshooting

  9. FAQ

  10. Support

1. Installation

Requirements:

  • Blender 3.0 or newer

  • Minimum 4GB RAM (8GB recommended for large mazes)

  • Graphics card with OpenGL 3.3 support

Installation Steps:

  1. Download the add-on ZIP file

  2. Open Blender

  3. Go to Edit > Preferences > Add-ons

  4. Click Install… and select the ZIP file

  5. Enable Advanced Maze Generator Pro in the add-ons list

  6. The panel will appear in the 3D Viewport > N-Panel > Maze Generation

2. Getting Started

Quick Start Guide:

  1. Open Blender and switch to the 3D Viewport

  2. Press N to open the N-Panel

  3. Find the Maze Generation tab

  4. Set width/height (recommended: 20×20 for beginners)

  5. Choose a shape (Rectangle is default)

  6. Select an algorithm (Recursive Backtracking recommended for starters)

  7. Click Generate Maze

👉 Your maze will be created with separate objects for walls and floors, ready for material assignment.

3. Basic Controls

Basic Settings:

  • Shape – Choose from 15+ predefined shapes

  • Algorithm – Select generation method

  • Width/Height – Maze dimensions (cells)

  • Random Seed – Same seed = reproducible maze

Appearance Settings:

  • Cell Size – Unit size of maze cells

  • Wall Height – Wall elevation

  • Wall Thickness – Control geometry thickness

  • Wall Angle – Tilt walls inward/outward

Maze Features:

  • Complexity – Overall difficulty

  • Dead End Ratio – Adjust number of dead ends

  • Symmetry – Generate mirrored layouts

  • Center Focus – Converge paths toward center

  • Merge Models – Optimize into single geometry

Path Display:

  • Show Solution Path – Visualize correct route

  • Show Start/End – Add markers

  • Custom Colors – Control path/marker colors

4. Advanced Features

  • Room Generation – Insert open spaces with configurable connections

  • Central Paths – Create wide or styled corridors

  • Edge Circuits – Add navigable perimeter paths

  • Loop Control – Enable or restrict loop formations

  • Weighted Generation – Use heat maps for controlled path bias

  • Performance Optimization – Quality levels, iteration controls, memory/time limits

5. Algorithm Reference

  • Recursive Backtracking – Depth-first, long corridors

  • Kruskal’s Algorithm – Tree-like organic structures

  • Prim’s Algorithm – Balanced complexity

  • Wilson’s Algorithm – Uniform spanning trees

  • Eller’s Algorithm – Row-by-row, memory efficient

  • Binary Tree – Simple, directional bias

  • Sidewinder – Horizontal corridors

  • Growing Tree – Customizable priority-based generation

6. Shape Options

  • Basic: Rectangle, Circle, Ellipse, Triangle

  • Geometric: Diamond, Pentagon, Hexagon, Octagon

  • Special: Star, Heart, Cross, Ring

  • Complex: L-shape, T-shape, Spiral, Fractal, Noise

7. Performance Settings

  • Quality Levels: Low / Medium / High / Ultra

  • Optimization Modes: Speed / Balanced / Quality

  • Memory Controls: Limit RAM, timeout protection, iteration caps

  • Batch Generation: Auto-generate multiple mazes with naming system

8. Troubleshooting

  • Slow Generation → Reduce size, lower quality, use simpler algorithms

  • High Memory Usage → Merge models, reduce dimensions, lower limits

  • Blender Crashes → Update Blender, reduce maze size, free up RAM

  • Maze Looks Wrong → Reset parameters, try new seed

  • Objects Not Selectable → Check Outliner, hidden objects, correct view layer

9. FAQ

Q: Can I edit generated mazes?
A: Yes, walls/floors are separate editable objects.

Q: How do I apply materials?
A: Select wall/floor → Apply in Material Properties.

Q: Can I export to other software?
A: Yes, via FBX/OBJ/etc. or JSON export.

Q: Max maze size?
A: Recommended under 200×200, depends on system memory.

Q: Can I create 3D mazes?
A: Currently 2D only. Stack multiple mazes for multi-level layouts.

Q: Is solvability guaranteed?
A: Yes, unless loops are explicitly enabled.

10. Support

  • 📘 Check documentation updates

  • 🐞 Report bugs via project repository

  • 🛒 Contact support on BlenderMarket

  • 💬 Join community forums for tips

Version: 3.2.0
Last Updated: 2025
Compatible with: Blender 3.0+

✅ Thank you for using Advanced Maze Generator Pro!
